title: Die Privatsekretärin
writer: István Békeffy, Franz Schulz, István Szomaházy
actors: Renate Müller, Hermann Thimig, Felix Bressart
plot: A vivacious girl seeks an office job in hard times in the hope of landing a rich man. The director of the bank she lands up working at, flirts with her while hiding his identity, so at first she rejects him.
